summary: Split tokens/tokens.json into individual files per token set, mirroring the existing tier structure (brand/, scaling/, breakpoint/, mode/, alias/, components[deprecated]/).

notes: tokens/tokens.json retained on disk pending manual confirmation before removal.

summary: Added style-dictionary + @tokens-studio/sd-transforms build pipeline (style-dictionary.config.mjs, `npm run tokens:build`) to compile DTCG alias tokens into consumable CSS custom properties, scoped per brand x mode (brandA/brandB x light/dark). Typography composites are expanded into separate properties (not the lossy CSS `font` shorthand) so letter-spacing is preserved.
verifiedBy: Reviewer Agent — PASS, generated CSS spot-checked against alias JSON source values for all 4 brand/mode combinations
notes: Generated CSS under projects/components/src/lib/tokens/*.css is gitignored — regenerate via `npm run tokens:build` (also runs automatically before storybook/build).

summary: Added Button component, Primary variant (ToshiButtonComponent, projects/components/src/lib/button/) wrapping PrimeNG's unstyled pButton directive, styled entirely via alias token CSS custom properties. Storybook stories (Base/Button: Default, Disabled, Focus) and human documentation (docs/components/button.md) added.
verifiedBy: Reviewer Agent — PASS WITH NOTES, see docs/components/button.md accessibility notes for the pre-existing focus-outline contrast caveat
notes: Rejected alias.color.primary.interaction/onInteraction for the fill (4.35:1 contrast, fails WCAG AA text minimum) in favor of alias.color.primary.brand/onBrand (7.46:1). No new tokens created.
